_comment: Canonical safe error bodies. A missing record and a forbidden cross-provider lookup MUST be byte-identical (except request_id) so existence is never disclosed.

error.message: The requested resource was not found.
The requested resource was not found.
The case was modified by someone else. Re-read and retry.
Idempotency-Key header is required for this operation.
That case transition is not allowed from the current status.
Content contains prohibited fraud-verdict or financial-action language.
Case resolve is not implemented in this phase (P1-M2 scaffolding).
